# netbox_vlan_group (Data Source)

Fetches a single VLAN group from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single VLAN group by ID.
data "netbox_vlan_group" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "vlan_group_name" {
  value = data.netbox_vlan_group.example.name
}

output "vlan_group_slug" {
  value = data.netbox_vlan_group.example.slug
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the VLAN group.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the VLAN group.
- `max_vid` (Number) Maximum VLAN ID.
- `min_vid` (Number) Minimum VLAN ID.
- `name` (String) Name of the VLAN group.
- `scope_id` (Number) The ID of the scope object.
- `scope_type` (String) The type of the scope object.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the VLAN group.
